baseObservation: Uploaded bundle describes v4.8 but contains v4.9 through v5.4 runtime/doc/check files.
patchStrategy: Overlay-safe runtime patch on top of the existing clean bundle without breaking v5.4 validators.

unnecessaryFiles: .git directory is included in the uploaded ZIP and should not be included in a public deploy ZIP.
Historical PATCH_NOTES and checklist files from v1.2 through v5.4 are useful for archives but unnecessary for the live Pages artifact.
tools/script0.js is empty; tools/script2.js is large and appears to be development-only.
duplicateOrLegacyCode: Multiple generation runtimes coexist: v49, v50, v51, v53, v54. This is intentional for compatibility but increases coordination risk.
README/package/manifest versions were inconsistent before patch: README v4.9, package/sw v5.4, manifest v5.1.
uiOverlap: Fishing screen had several legacy panels/docks/FABs that can overlap the action zone on narrow mobile screens.
Status and guide cards competed with reel and bite overlays during action fishing.
performanceBottlenecks: index.html is over 670 KB with about 10k lines, causing long parse/maintain cost.
296+ SVG art files exist in assets/art; not all are precached, but repo/deploy size remains high.
Multiple canvas/DOM animation layers can run together unless low-end guards are active.
serviceWorker: Previous cache version was v5.4.0 and could keep older index/runtime after GitHub Pages updates.
New patch bumps the cache namespace and includes explicit runtime cache clearing message support.

patched: Added v49 action mobile runtime overlay.
Updated Service Worker cache version and precache list.
Added GitHub Actions check script for v49 action patch.
Added standalone Phaser prototype with placeholder asset URLs.
